summary: Episode 22: Overzealous with all he had learned, Tariq pushed himself too hard — copying all night, skipping meals and rest. Salim taught him moderation: the Quran calls them a middle nation, and even good deeds are best kept steady, not extreme. Tariq learned to pace his devotion. The recovered traveler began quietly preparing to continue his journey. Noor still doesn't know who leaves the gifts at her door.
open_threads: Noor still doesn't know who leaves the anonymous gifts at her door (Tariq knows it is Salim)
The recovered traveler is preparing to continue his journey
Tariq is learning balance — to pace his learning and devotion
Noor's courtyard reading circle keeps growing
